Molecular Biology and Genetics Departmental Seminars #1: Prof. Dr. Özlem Tastan Bishop

Our First Departmental Seminar was held with great participation! Thanks to Prof. Dr. Özlem Tastan Bishop for her wonderful talk on “Proteins and Missense Mutations in Health and Disease”.
